item.description:
BBC SPORT NI @BBCSPORTNI · 17min NEW PODCAST ALERT
Reaction from Galway after Ireland’s thumping win over Italy with Lindsay Peat & Gavin Andrews De bbc.co.uk 1 1 442

item.title: TheSundayGame: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 40min 'As championship debuts go, they couldn't be any better' says Walter Walsh (who a
item.description: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 40min 'As championship debuts go, they couldn't be any better' says Walter Walsh (who also had a decent championship debut...) of Galway's young guns, with Aaron Niland, Jason Rabbitte and Rory Burke scoring 3-11 of the overall winning tally 9 3 mil

item.title: TheSundayGame: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 48min 'We're at our lowest ebb in a decade' - Neil McManus gives his reaction after Ant
item.description: The Sunday Game @TheSundayGame · 48min 'We're at our lowest ebb in a decade' - Neil McManus gives his reaction after Antrim's loss at home to Down in their Joe McDonagh Cup opener 1 5 3 mil

item.title: thomasniblock: Thomas Niblock @thomasniblock · 1h Derry v Antrim full-match coverage if you’re interested… bbc.co.uk The Championship -
item.description: Thomas Niblock @thomasniblock · 1h Derry v Antrim full-match coverage if you’re interested… bbc.co.uk The Championship - 2026: Quarter-Final: Derry v Antrim Mark Sidebottom presents live Ulster Championship coverage as Antrim travel to Celtic Park to take on Derry. Commentary is by Thomas Niblock, with pitchside updates from Sarah Mulkerrins. 2 698

item.title: thomasniblock: Thomas Niblock @thomasniblock · 1h Delivering, water. Cita UNICEF @UNICEF · 23h UNICEF is outraged by the killing of two
item.description:
Thomas Niblock @thomasniblock · 1h Delivering, water. Cita UNICEF @UNICEF · 23h UNICEF is outraged by the killing of two drivers of trucks contracted by UNICEF to provide clean water to families in the Gaza Strip.
The victims were killed by Israeli fire in an incident that took place early this morning at the Mansoura water filling point in northern Gaza. 1 4 84 5 mil
